query: any(i in labels for i in ['unsubscribe', 'ai/otp', 'ai/transaction', 'ai/investment', 'ai/order', 'ai/subscription', 'ai/newsletter', 'ai/promotional', 'ai/security', 'ai/social', 'ai/delivery', 'ai/cc-statements', 'ai/non-cc-statements'])

timediff > day and any(i in labels for i in ['ai/security', 'ai/transaction', 'ai/cc-statements', 'ai/non-cc-statements', 'ai/billing', 'ai/travel', 'ai/subscription', 'ai/investment', 'ai/support', 'ai/system', 'ai/government'])
timediff > month and any(i in labels for i in ['ai/delivery', 'ai/order'])
timediff > hour and any(i in labels for i in ['ai/otp', 'ai/promotional', 'ai/social', 'ai/newsletter'])
timediff > week and any(i in labels for i in ['ai/security', 'ai/support', 'ai/system'])
timediff > month and any(i in labels for i in ['ai/investment'])
